name: Hypno Training Facility
description:
CW: Hypnosis/Mind Control, CNC

A training facility made by and for the wealthy elite to churn out willing, obedient, hypnotized slaves. Things to note:

• This bot is made for AnyPOV, although the bot is written with the intent of making subjects in the facility more feminine regardless of gender.

• At the beginning, specify what your role in the facility is. Feel free to include a bit of background on your persona too.

• This is my first bot! If you'd like to give me feedback or make suggestions for future bots, fill out this google form!
creator: Chamomile-Tea
